PROVINSIALE KOERANT, BUITENGEWOON, 29 AUGUSTUS 2018 
No. 246    3
Proclamation • Proklamasie
PROCLAMATION 116 OF 2018 
116	
Town-planning and Townships Ordinance (15/1986): Erven 7695, up to and including 7712 and part of Aluminium Drive, Clayville Extension 52	
	
246
CITY OF EKURHULENI 
TEMBISA CUSTOMER CARE CENTRE 
EKURHULENI AMENDMENT SCHEME: T0021 
 
It is hereby notified in terms of the provisions of Section 57(1)(a) of the Town-planning and 
Townships Ordinance, 1986 (Ordinance 15 of 1986), that the Ekurhuleni Metropolitan 
Municipality has approved the application for the Amendment of the Ekurhuleni Town Planning 
Scheme, 2014, being the rezoning of Erven 7695 up to and including 7712 and part of 
Aluminium Drive, Clayville Extension 52, to “ Business 2” including Motor Dealers, Fitment 
Centre, Motor Workshop, Showrooms and Places of Entertainment as indicated, subject to 
certain further conditions. 
 
Map 3 and the scheme clauses of this amendment scheme are filed with the Area Manager: 
City Planning Department, Tembisa Customer Care Area, and are open to inspect during 
normal office hours. 
 
The amendment is known as Ekurhuleni Amendment Scheme T0021 and shall come into 
operation on the date of publication of this notice. 
 
Dr Imogen Mashazi:  City Manager: 
City of Ekurhuleni Metropolitan Municipality,  
Private Bag X1069, Germiston, 1400 
 
Notice: CP050  
[15/2/7/T0021]
